channel.title: KeepedAlive on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in KeepedAlive on Tech Blog

item.title: [Raspberry Pi] HA K8s Pi Cluster (I)
item.description: By having a Highly Available Kubernetes Pi Cluster, you will have full control over your production grade environment on-premise HA Kubernetes Pi Cluster (Part I) (Total Setup Time: 25 mins) On this special day, I will like to wish all Singaporeans and Singapore a Happy 55th National Day! With the newly purchase 2x Raspberry Pi Model B 8GB and 64GB SD card to my collection, I will setup a Highly Available Kubernetes Pi Cluster.
